prompt:
You are a classical planner. Return only the final plan as a sequence of actions.

Domain (PDDL):
(define (domain blocks)
  (:predicates (on ?x ?y) (ontable ?x) (clear ?x) (handempty) (holding ?x))
  (:action pick-up
    :parameters (?x)
    :precondition (and (clear ?x) (ontable ?x) (handempty))
    :effect (and (not (ontable ?x)) (not (clear ?x)) (not (handempty)) (holding ?x)))
  (:action put-down
    :parameters (?x)
    :precondition (holding ?x)
    :effect (and (ontable ?x) (clear ?x) (handempty) (not (holding ?x))))
  (:action stack
    :parameters (?x ?y)
    :precondition (and (holding ?x) (clear ?y))
    :effect (and (on ?x ?y) (clear ?x) (handempty) (not (holding ?x)) (not (clear ?y))))
  (:action unstack
    :parameters (?x ?y)
    :precondition (and (on ?x ?y) (clear ?x) (handempty))
    :effect (and (holding ?x) (clear ?y) (not (on ?x ?y)) (not (clear ?x)) (not (handempty)))))

Problem (PDDL):
(define (problem blocks-1)
  (:domain blocks)
  (:objects A B C)
  (:init (ontable A) (ontable B) (ontable C) (clear A) (clear B) (clear C) (handempty))
  (:goal (and (on A B) (on B C))))

  (:predicates (on ?x ?y) (ontable ?x) (clear ?x) (handempty) (holding ?x))
  (:action pick-up
    :parameters (?x)
    :precondition (and (clear ?x) (ontable ?x) (handempty))
    :effect (and (not (ontable ?x)) (not (clear ?x)) (not (handempty)) (holding ?x)))
  (:action put-down

  (:action stack

    :precondition (and (holding ?x) (clear ?y))
    :effect (and (on ?x ?y) (clear ?x) (handempty) (not (holding ?x)) (not (clear ?y))))

Domain (PDDL):
(define (domain gripper)
  (:predicates (room ?r) (ball ?b) (gripper ?g)
               (at ?b ?r) (at-robot ?r)
               (free ?g) (carry ?b ?g))
  (:action move
    :parameters (?from ?to)
    :precondition (and (room ?from) (room ?to) (at-robot ?from))
    :effect (and (at-robot ?to) (not (at-robot ?from))))
  (:action pick
    :parameters (?b ?r ?g)
    :precondition (and (ball ?b) (room ?r) (gripper ?g)
                       (at ?b ?r) (at-robot ?r) (free ?g))
    :effect (and (carry ?b ?g) (not (at ?b ?r)) (not (free ?g))))
  (:action drop
    :parameters (?b ?r ?g)
    :precondition (and (ball ?b) (room ?r) (gripper ?g)
                       (carry ?b ?g) (at-robot ?r))
    :effect (and (at ?b ?r) (free ?g) (not (carry ?b ?g)))))

Problem (PDDL):
(define (problem gripper-1)
  (:domain gripper)
  (:objects roomA roomB - room
            ball1 ball2 - ball
            left right - gripper)
  (:init (room roomA) (room roomB)
         (ball ball1) (ball ball2)
         (gripper left) (gripper right)
         (at-robot roomA)
         (at ball1 roomA) (at ball2 roomA)
         (free left) (free right))
  (:goal (and (at ball1 roomB) (at ball2 roomB))))

Domain (PDDL):
(define (domain logistics)
  (:predicates (truck ?t) (city ?c) (loc ?l)
               (in-city ?l ?c)
               (at-truck ?t ?l)
               (package ?p)
               (at ?p ?l)
               (in ?p ?t))
  (:action drive
    :parameters (?t ?from ?to ?c)
    :precondition (and (truck ?t) (loc ?from) (loc ?to) (city ?c)
                       (in-city ?from ?c) (in-city ?to ?c)
                       (at-truck ?t ?from))
    :effect (and (at-truck ?t ?to) (not (at-truck ?t ?from))))
  (:action load
    :parameters (?p ?t ?l)
    :precondition (and (package ?p) (truck ?t) (loc ?l)
                       (at ?p ?l) (at-truck ?t ?l))
    :effect (and (in ?p ?t) (not (at ?p ?l))))
  (:action unload
    :parameters (?p ?t ?l)
    :precondition (and (package ?p) (truck ?t) (loc ?l)
                       (in ?p ?t) (at-truck ?t ?l))
    :effect (and (at ?p ?l) (not (in ?p ?t)))))

Problem (PDDL):
(define (problem logistics-1)
  (:domain logistics)
  (:objects c1 - city
            l1 l2 - loc
            t1 - truck
            p1 - package)
  (:init (city c1)
         (loc l1) (loc l2)
         (in-city l1 c1) (in-city l2 c1)
         (truck t1)
         (package p1)
         (at-truck t1 l1)
         (at p1 l1))
  (:goal (and (at p1 l2))))

You are a classical planner. Return only the final plan as a sequence of actions.

Domain (PDDL):
(define (domain zeno-travel)
  (:predicates (city ?c) (plane ?p) (person ?x)
               (at-plane ?p ?c) (at ?x ?c)
               (in ?x ?p))
  (:action board
    :parameters (?x ?p ?c)
    :precondition (and (person ?x) (plane ?p) (city ?c)
                       (at ?x ?c) (at-plane ?p ?c))
    :effect (and (in ?x ?p) (not (at ?x ?c))))
  (:action debark
    :parameters (?x ?p ?c)
    :precondition (and (person ?x) (plane ?p) (city ?c)
                       (in ?x ?p) (at-plane ?p ?c))
    :effect (and (at ?x ?c) (not (in ?x ?p))))
  (:action fly
    :parameters (?p ?from ?to)
    :precondition (and (plane ?p) (city ?from) (city ?to)
                       (at-plane ?p ?from))
    :effect (and (at-plane ?p ?to) (not (at-plane ?p ?from)))))

Problem (PDDL):
(define (problem zeno-1)
  (:domain zeno-travel)
  (:objects c1 c2 - city
            p1 - plane
            alice - person)
  (:init (city c1) (city c2)
         (plane p1)
         (person alice)
         (at-plane p1 c1)
         (at alice c1))
  (:goal (and (at alice c2))))
